languages.text: "Литания "Ад Санктум Империалис", строфа тысяча пятая". {n}Себериан выглядит невозмутимо и даже немного разочарованно.{/n} "На что вы рассчитывали? Вам не покинуть дворец жив{mf|ым|ой}. И даже если это вам удастся — моя сенешаль уже изменит литанию допуска. Какая пустая трата жизни..."

"'Ad Sanctum Imperialis,' stanza one thousand and five." {n}Seberian looks unfazed and even a little disappointed.{/n} "What were you expecting? You will not leave the palace alive. And even if you manage to do so, my Seneschal will simply change the access litany. What a waste of life..."
languages.original_text: "Литания "Ад Санктум Империалис", строфа тысяча пятая". {n}Себериан выглядит невозмутимо и даже немного разочарованно.{/n} "На что вы рассчитывали? Вам не покинуть дворец жив{mf|ым|ой}. И даже если это вам удастся — моя сенешаль уже изменит литанию допуска. Какая пустая трата жизни..."

traits.locale_text: "'Ad Sanctum Imperialis,' stanza one thousand and five." {n}Seberian looks unfazed and even a little disappointed.{/n} "What were you expecting? You will not leave the palace alive. And even if you manage to do so, my Seneschal will simply change the access litany. What a waste of life..."

"'Ad Sanctum Imperialis,' stanza one thousand and five." {n}Seberian looks unfazed and even a little disappointed.{/n} "What were you expecting? You will not leave the palace alive. And even if you manage to do so, my Seneschal will simply change the access litany. What a waste of life..."

"'Ad Sanctum Imperialis,' stanza one thousand and five." {n}Seberian looks unfazed and even a little disappointed.{/n} "What were you expecting? You will not leave the palace alive. And even if you manage to do so, my Seneschal will simply change the access litany. What a waste of life..."

languages.text: "'Ad Sanctum Imperialis,' Stanze eintausendundfünf." {n}Seberian sieht dich unbeeindruckt und ein wenig enttäuscht an.{/n} "Was hattet Ihr erwartet? Ihr werdet den Palast nicht lebend verlassen. Und selbst wenn doch, wird meine Truchsessin einfach die Zugangslitanei ändern. Was für eine Verschwendung von Leben ..."
languages.original_text: "'Ad Sanctum Imperialis,' stanza one thousand and five." {n}Seberian looks unfazed and even a little disappointed.{/n} "What were you expecting? You will not leave the palace alive. And even if you manage to do so, my Seneschal will simply change the access litany. What a waste of life..."

traits.locale_text: "'Ad Sanctum Imperialis,' Stanze eintausendundfünf." {n}Seberian sieht dich unbeeindruckt und ein wenig enttäuscht an.{/n} "Was hattet Ihr erwartet? Ihr werdet den Palast nicht lebend verlassen. Und selbst wenn doch, wird meine Truchsessin einfach die Zugangslitanei ändern. Was für eine Verschwendung von Leben ..."

languages.text: “‘前往帝国圣所’，第一千零五节。”{n}塞贝里安看起来不为所动，甚至还有点失望。{/n}“你在想什么？你不可能活着离开这座宫殿。就算你真能出去，我的总领也会换掉通行祷文。真是白白送命……”
languages.original_text: "'Ad Sanctum Imperialis,' stanza one thousand and five." {n}Seberian looks unfazed and even a little disappointed.{/n} "What were you expecting? You will not leave the palace alive. And even if you manage to do so, my Seneschal will simply change the access litany. What a waste of life..."

traits.locale_text: “‘前往帝国圣所’，第一千零五节。”{n}塞贝里安看起来不为所动，甚至还有点失望。{/n}“你在想什么？你不可能活着离开这座宫殿。就算你真能出去，我的总领也会换掉通行祷文。真是白白送命……”

languages.text: « Ad Sanctum Imperialis, stance mille cinq. » {n}Seberian ne semble pas impressionné, et même un peu déçu.{/n} « À quoi vous attendiez-vous ? Vous ne quitterez pas ce palais en vie. Et même si vous y parveniez, ma sénéchale se contenterait de changer la litanie d'accès. Quel gâchis... »
languages.original_text: "'Ad Sanctum Imperialis,' stanza one thousand and five." {n}Seberian looks unfazed and even a little disappointed.{/n} "What were you expecting? You will not leave the palace alive. And even if you manage to do so, my Seneschal will simply change the access litany. What a waste of life..."

traits.locale_text: « Ad Sanctum Imperialis, stance mille cinq. » {n}Seberian ne semble pas impressionné, et même un peu déçu.{/n} « À quoi vous attendiez-vous ? Vous ne quitterez pas ce palais en vie. Et même si vous y parveniez, ma sénéchale se contenterait de changer la litanie d'accès. Quel gâchis... »

languages.text: «"Ad Sanctum Imperialis", estrofa mil y cinco». {n}Seberian se muestra impasible; hasta parece un tanto decepcionado.{/n} «¿Qué esperaba? No saldrá con vida de este palacio. Y aunque consiguiera hacerlo, mi senescal se limitará a cambiar la letanía de acceso. Qué pérdida de vida más innecesaria...».
languages.original_text: "'Ad Sanctum Imperialis,' stanza one thousand and five." {n}Seberian looks unfazed and even a little disappointed.{/n} "What were you expecting? You will not leave the palace alive. And even if you manage to do so, my Seneschal will simply change the access litany. What a waste of life..."

traits.locale_text: «"Ad Sanctum Imperialis", estrofa mil y cinco». {n}Seberian se muestra impasible; hasta parece un tanto decepcionado.{/n} «¿Qué esperaba? No saldrá con vida de este palacio. Y aunque consiguiera hacerlo, mi senescal se limitará a cambiar la letanía de acceso. Qué pérdida de vida más innecesaria...».

languages.text: "'Ad Sanctum İmperialis', bin beşinci kıta." {n}Seberian, etkilenmemiş ve hatta biraz hayal kırıklığına uğramış görünüyor.{/n} "Ne bekliyordun ki? Saraydan sağ çıkamayacaksın. Başarsan bile Seneşalim, erişim ilahisini değiştirecek. Ne büyük bir hayat israfı..."
languages.original_text: "'Ad Sanctum Imperialis,' stanza one thousand and five." {n}Seberian looks unfazed and even a little disappointed.{/n} "What were you expecting? You will not leave the palace alive. And even if you manage to do so, my Seneschal will simply change the access litany. What a waste of life..."

traits.locale_text: "'Ad Sanctum İmperialis', bin beşinci kıta." {n}Seberian, etkilenmemiş ve hatta biraz hayal kırıklığına uğramış görünüyor.{/n} "Ne bekliyordun ki? Saraydan sağ çıkamayacaksın. Başarsan bile Seneşalim, erişim ilahisini değiştirecek. Ne büyük bir hayat israfı..."

languages.text: 「『聖なる帝国への道』の1005番目の詩。」{n}セベリアンは動揺していないどころか、少しがっかりしているようだった。{/n}「何を求めていたのですか？ この宮殿から生きて出られるわけではありません。仮に生き延びたとしても、私の執事はこの宮殿へのアクセス呪文を変えるだけです。人生の無駄遣いですね…」
languages.original_text: "'Ad Sanctum Imperialis,' stanza one thousand and five." {n}Seberian looks unfazed and even a little disappointed.{/n} "What were you expecting? You will not leave the palace alive. And even if you manage to do so, my Seneschal will simply change the access litany. What a waste of life..."

traits.locale_text: 「『聖なる帝国への道』の1005番目の詩。」{n}セベリアンは動揺していないどころか、少しがっかりしているようだった。{/n}「何を求めていたのですか？ この宮殿から生きて出られるわけではありません。仮に生き延びたとしても、私の執事はこの宮殿へのアクセス呪文を変えるだけです。人生の無駄遣いですね…」
